channel.title: Xiaomi 17 Max MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Xiaomi 17 Max MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.304.0.WAFCNXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 17 Max China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17 Max China

Codename: byron

Version: OS3.0.304.0.WAFCNXM | 16.0

Size: 11.5 GB

MD5: 1fa5c5a68a9d14652a99ed5ae0465fc6

Changelog:
[System]
Optimization: Optimized overnight standby power consumption reduces abnormal battery drain
Optimization: Improved gaming performance and reduced accidental touches when using the Home screen
Fix: Home screen wallpaper zoom animation could be missing in some scenarios
Fix: App floating windows opened from the sidebar could appear with square corners in some scenarios
Fix: Browser could display incorrectly in some scenarios

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.304.0.WAFCNXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 17 Max China
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17 Max China

Codename: byron

Version: OS3.0.304.0.WAFCNXM | 16.0

Size: 8.8 GB

MD5: b3a2165acf5f38fe08cce342cd104df2

Changelog:
[System]
Optimization: Optimized overnight standby power consumption reduces abnormal battery drain
Optimization: Improved gaming performance and reduced accidental touches when using the Home screen
Fix: Home screen wallpaper zoom animation could be missing in some scenarios
Fix: App floating windows opened from the sidebar could appear with square corners in some scenarios
Fix: Browser could display incorrectly in some scenarios

Download: Here
